nasb.text: “For to everyone who has, more shall be given, and he will have an abundance; but from the one who does not have, even what he does have shall be taken away.

esv.text: For to everyone who has will more be given, and he will have an abundance. But from the one who has not, even what he has will be taken away.

cnv.text: 因為凡是有的，還要給他，他就充足有餘；凡是沒有的，就算他有甚麼也要拿去。

ccb.text: 因为凡有的，还要给他更多，使他丰富有余；凡没有的，连他仅有的，也要夺去。

csbs.text: 因为凡是有的，还要赐给他，使他丰足有余；那没有的，连他有的也将从他那里被拿走。
